Edité le_26 novembre 2025_FRAIS DE DEPLACEMENT-HEBERGEMENT DU PERSONNEL NAVIGANT EP4_Nom_Prénom_Matricule_Affectation_Base_Spécialité_Libellé_Fonction_Classe_Echelon_Mois_BOUCHER_HELENE_30000076_EQTL1_CDG_OPL_OPL 100%_3_02_OCTOBRE   2025_Avion_Départ_Arrivée_Montant_Transport_Ventilation_N°_PN_PN Non_SAB_Esc_Horaires locaux_ Dec_Pdéj_IR_MF_Esc_Horaires locaux_Dec_Pdéj_IR_MF_Total Indem_Type_km_Mt Dec_Ligne_Exonéré_Exonéré_SST_VST_CDG_01 | 07:30_01 | 09:30_SST_VJD_CDG_01 | 10:00_01 | 10:45_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_01 | 10:45_01 | 12:15_SST_VST_CDG_02 | 07:30_02 | 09:30_SST_VJD_CDG_02 | 10:00_02 | 10:45_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_02 | 10:45_02 | 13:45_SST_VST_CDG_03 | 07:30_03 | 09:30_SST_VJD_CDG_03 | 10:00_03 | 10:45_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_03 | 10:45_03 | 12:15_SST_VJD_CDG_06 | 08:15_06 | 12:15_SST_VJD_CDG_06 | 14:00_06 | 17:00_G6_66_SST_VST_CDG_07 | 11:00_07 | 13:00_SST_VJD_CDG_07 | 13:30_07 | 14:15_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_07 | 14:15_07 | 16:15_SST_VST_CDG_08 | 11:00_08 | 13:00_SST_VJD_CDG_08 | 13:30_08 | 14:15_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_08 | 14:15_08 | 15:45_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_08 | 15:45_08 | 16:15_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_08 | 16:15_08 | 16:45_SST_VTD_CDG_09 | 10:00_09 | 12:00_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_09 | 12:30_09 | 13:30_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_09 | 13:30_09 | 14:30_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_09 | 14:30_09 | 15:30_SST_VTD_CDG_10 | 10:00_10 | 12:00_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_10 | 12:30_10 | 13:30_SST_VJD_CDG_13 | 10:00_13 | 12:00_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_13 | 12:00_13 | 12:30_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_13 | 12:30_13 | 12:50_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_13 | 12:50_13 | 13:20_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_13 | 13:20_13 | 13:35_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_13 | 13:35_13 | 14:00_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_13 | 14:00_13 | 14:25_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_13 | 14:25_13 | 14:40_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_13 | 14:40_13 | 14:55_SST_VFE_CDG_14 | 14:00_14 | 18:00_G6_66_SST_VFE_CDG_15 | 10:00_15 | 14:00_G6_66_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_18 | 09:00_18 | 11:00_SST_VAO_Hors-Base_18 | 11:00_18 | 15:00_SST_VFE_CDG_19 | 18:00_19 | 22:00_G6_66_<2025103000007600000000>_6 | 13175
